title: Kohram
subTitle: When a teacher is killed by two village tyrants, Thakur and Kalia, his brother Arjun swears to avenge him. Years later, Arjun kills Thakur and then joins forces with his brother's sons to face Kalia.

title: Ganga Tere Desh Mein
subTitle: After arresting and institutionalising a notorious criminal who has lost his mental faculties, inspector Ajay finds his mother feeding the criminal. But when he digs deeper he uncovers a tragic truth.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Prithviraj Chauhan
subTitle: Prithviraj Chauhan, a great ruler, strives to overcome multiple challenges in order to defeat his enemies and ensure peace in his kingdom.

title: Devi
subTitle: Devi, a snake goddess, vows to protect the daughter of the man who died while trying to save her from a powerful demon. However, she falls in love with a human, unaware of the consequences.

title: Sirf Tum
subTitle: Deepak and Aarti fall in love with each other without ever meeting each other. Later, Aarti sets out to look for him in the city of Delhi.

title: Jaanwar
subTitle: A criminal changes the course of his life when he decides to raise a baby who has survived a train crash, but chaos ensues when his past begins to haunt him.

title: Bruce Lee: The Fighter
subTitle: Kartik sacrifices his studies for his sister and becomes a stuntman. But he ends up helping a cop to unearth the evil designs of Deepak.

title: Phool Aur Angaar
subTitle: A young man rescues a woman from being molested but gets accused of the heinous crime instead. Trying to apprehend the miscreants, he gets caught in a web of deception and lies.

title: Khal Nayak
subTitle: Inspector Ram succeeds in nabbing notorious criminal Ballu. When Ballu's escape taints Ram's name, his fiancée, Ganga, decides to trap Ballu. But, things get complicated when Ballu starts liking her.

title: Khal Nayak
subTitle: Inspector Ram succeeds in nabbing notorious criminal Ballu. When Ballu's escape taints Ram's name, his fiancée, Ganga, decides to trap Ballu. But, things get complicated when Ballu starts liking her.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Bulandi
subTitle: Dharamraj Thakur, the head of a village, is highly respected by the villagers, However, his dignity is at stake when his younger brother, Arjun, is accused of raping a school teacher.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Insaniyat Ke Devta
subTitle: Two friends, Balbir and Anwar, join forces to defeat an influential tycoon who wishes to destroy an ashram and use the property to further his own selfish purposes.

title: Jai Shree Ganesh
subTitle: Revered as the god of good luck, Lord Ganesh returns to the world to grant good fortune to the living and relieve pain and misery among devotees.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Shoorveer
subTitle: Siddharth, a fashion editor who hates horses, decides to venture into the world of horse racing to impress the girl of his dreams.

title: The Hero: Love Story of a Spy
subTitle: Arun Khanna, an Indian spy, collaborates with Reshma to stop a nuclear attack. However, Reshma's identity is compromised during her undercover mission in Pakistan.

title: Jigar
subTitle: Duryodhan, a wrestler, is Raju's friend, but due to a misunderstanding he rapes and kills Raju's sister. Raju later seeks Baba Thakur's help to train in fighting to avenge his sister's death.

title: Loha
subTitle: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

title: Gumnaam
subTitle: An aspiring director reluctantly becomes a police officer. Soon after, he starts investigating a serial murder case wherein the killer targets teenage girls.

title: Gumnaam
subTitle: An aspiring director reluctantly becomes a police officer. Soon after, he starts investigating a serial murder case wherein the killer targets teenage girls.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Afsana Dilwalon Ka
subTitle: A gifted singer, Banne Khan, falls in love with Saba. However, Titlibai, a woman who wants him to marry her daughter, invites him to stay at her house.

title: Gabbar Sher
subTitle: After receiving an invitation from his former girlfriend in Bangkok, a forest guide visits her in the hope of reconciliation, but becomes embroiled in a series of bizarre events.

title: Hero Hindustani
subTitle: A young woman conspires with a man to fake a relationship, outsmarting her grandfather's plans to marry her off to a stranger.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
subTitle: When stars misalign, love blossoms between an astrology-obsessed idler and a headstrong fish heiress whose father will settle for nothing less than a hardworking son-in-law.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Azad fights against the systemic oppression of society. Soon, he finds himself in a web of deceit and crime as he teams up with a group of allies to take down a ruthless arms dealer.

title: Laadla
subTitle: Raju, an upright union leader, can do anything at his wheelchair-bound mother's behest, even if it means breaking his own heart and giving in to a rude heiress.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal, join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.
